project_type: IoT industrial safety platform - Go modular monolith gateway + TypeScript Lambda + React frontend
build_system: Makefile with targets: check-prereqs, format, lint, typecheck, test, test-contract, build, verify-fast, verify
test_framework: Go testing (services/gateway-server), Jest/Vitest (TypeScript), JSON schema validation (contracts)
verification_instructions: Run make verify-fast for fast check, make verify for full pre-PR verification
setup_instructions: Run make check-prereqs to verify tools. Go 1.25.1 and Node.js 22 available in sandbox (spec requires 1.26.5/24 LTS but we use what is available). No external package install possible.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no npm install, no go mod download from internet. Must use only stdlib and local code. No Docker daemon. Pre-installed: Go 1.25.1, Node.js 22, Python 3.9, make, jq, sqlite3, git.
contribution_requirements: One issue one branch one PR. Contract and failure tests before implementation. Simulator before hardware. make verify-fast during work, make verify before PR. Never push to main. Never merge PRs. R3 safety changes require T1+T2 human approval. No secrets in git.
key_patterns: Go package direction: cmd -> application -> domain. Adapters -> application/domain. Domain must not import adapters/cloud/vendor. JSON Schema contracts in contracts/ directory. Hardware profiles in infra/edge/hardware-profiles/. systemd service in infra/edge/systemd/.
directory_structure: Root monorepo: services/gateway-server (Go edge), services/cloud-backend (TypeScript Lambda), apps/frontend (React), infra/aws (CDK), infra/edge (provisioning/hardware-profiles/systemd), contracts/ (safety schemas), docs/ (specs), scripts/ (build utils), simulators/ (empty), tests/ (empty), packaging/gateway/ (deb assets)
